title: albizia lebbekoides
intro: Albizia lebbekoides, also known as the siris tree or false siris, is a deciduous tree species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Albizia lebbekoides include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
